---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026– ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

Quality Control Engineer, Güvenli Yaşam, Turkey, 2026 – ongoing.\
\
Organization Lead, Socia Startup, Turkey, 2025 – ongoing.

## Internships

Production Internship, Kozanoğlu Kozmaksan, Turkey, 2024.\
\
Continuous Improvement Internship, Yarış Kabin, Turkey, 2025.

# Projects

Socia – A social discovery platform that connects users with niche and local events and helps people discover high-quality local experiences.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, SQL

# Hobbies

Technology, entrepreneurship, data analytics, sports
